name: Wealth Concentration Analysis
description: Fan-in analytics agent: consumes a portfolio holdings payload (the wealth.holdings output) and computes single-name and asset-class concentration, HHI and effective number of positions, and breach flags against firm-configured thresholds. Computes from the supplied holdings; does not fetch data and does not take a relationship_id.

skills.name: analyze_concentration
skills.description: Analyse portfolio concentration risk from a holdings payload: per-position weights, top single-name exposure, HHI, effective number of positions, and firm-policy breach flags.
examples: how concentrated is the Whitman relationship
what is the single-name concentration risk for this client
does this account breach our concentration limits
what is the largest position as a share of the portfolio
compute the HHI for this client's holdings
any overconcentration flags on this relationship
which holdings are driving issuer concentration in this book
which positions are the biggest contributors to concentration risk
are any single names making up too much of the portfolio
identify the top issuer exposures pushing concentration higher

consumes.select: {positions: positions, total_value: total_value, allocation_by_class: allocation_by_class, relationship_id: relationship_id, relationship_name: relationship_name, currency: currency, as_of_date: as_of_date, risk_profile: risk_profile}
